untranslatable_reason: Signal requires correlation analysis between two time series (Series A and Series B) with lead-lag detection. The allowed indicator set does not include: (1) correlation coefficient calculation between arbitrary pairs of series, (2) cross-series coherence measurement, (3) lead-lag offset detection between series, or (4) multi-series divergence metrics. These are multivariate statistical operators not present in the allowed indicators list. The signal cannot be expressed using only single-series price/technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, ATR, etc.) and the basic comparison operators provided.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated pairs trading / co-integration signal that requires external calculation of rolling correlation, coherence measures, and Granger causality-style lead-lag analysis. It must be implemented as a custom indicator or pre-computed feature outside the standard backtest engine framework.
